const fontColor = {
  colors: [
    // 同上，使用相同的颜色配置
    ...fontBackgroundColor.colors
  ],
  columns: 9,
}

const fontFamily = {
  options: [
    '默认,default',
    '宋体,SimSun',
    '新宋体,NSimSun',
    '仿宋,FangSong',
    '楷体,KaiTi',
    '黑体,SimHei',
    '微软雅黑,Microsoft YaHei',
    '隶书,LiSu',
    '幼圆,YouYuan',
    '细明体,MingLiU',
    '新细明体,PMingLiU',
    '华文细黑,STXihei'
  ]
}

export { fontBackgroundColor, fontColor, fontFamily }
